perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black long-sleeved turtleneck, sits at a table with various strawberry-themed snack boxes and bags. (2) She presents a pink box of 'Strawberry Sun Cake,' opens it, removes a single pastry from its clear plastic wrapping, and takes a bite, revealing a pink strawberry filling. (3) She then moves to a box of 'Strawberry Jelly,' opens a small red cup which drips slightly, and takes a large bite with an exaggerated expression of surprise. (4) She introduces a green and pink bag of 'Dried Strawberry,' shows the dark red dried fruit inside a plastic tray, and eats one while making an 'amazed' face. (5) In the final segment, she holds the snack packages and gestures toward the text on the screen, pointing downwards.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately and continues throughout. A female voice begins speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) Clear sound effects of plastic crinkling and tapping on cardboard boxes occur as she handles the packaging. (3) Slurping and chewing sounds are heard when she eats the jelly and the sun cake. (4) The speaker's tone becomes noticeably higher in pitch and faster in speed as she reviews the third item, expressing high excitement. (5) The background music maintains its volume as the vocals explain the giveaway rules, ending with a slight fade.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Strawberry snacks you can only get in Miaoli' appears as a header hook. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the speaker's Mandarin narration throughout. (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '1. Strawberry Sun Cake', '2. Strawberry Jelly', and '3. Dried Strawberry' number the items. (4) Decorative/Hook Text: Emotive captions like 'Better than original flavor!', 'Super strawberry color', 'Big bite', 'Shocked!', and 'This is Nature gummy!' appear to emphasize her reactions. (5) Functional Text: 'Comment now if you want to try! Giveaway rules: 1. Share & Save 2. Comment' appears at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Item 1 Review -> Item 2 Review -> Item 3 Review -> Giveaway Call-to-Action

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a black long-sleeved turtleneck shirt and light-colored nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, neutral-colored wall behind the creator with a black mesh office chair visible.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Review 1 -> Review 2 -> Review 3 -> Giveaway CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote specific strawberry-flavored specialty snacks from Miaoli, Taiwan. By combining an enthusiastic food tasting/review with a 'comment to win' giveaway, the creator seeks to generate engagement and provide local travel/shopping recommendations.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically highlights regional brands and holds a giveaway for the products featured.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-cut editing style synced to upbeat music and high-density emotional text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'variety show' style editing common in East Asian social media to maintain high energy and viewer retention.
